scoring._comment_motion_bell_center: deprecated — motion now uses linear ramp, not bell curve

text_queries.landmark: a beautiful landmark building in a European city
text_queries.street_life: people walking on a lively city street with shops
text_queries.park: cycling through a green park with trees
text_queries.street_art: street art graffiti or mural on a wall
text_queries.dynamic_cycling: fast dynamic cycling through narrow city streets
text_queries.plaza: a wide open plaza or square with people
text_queries.waterfront: cycling along a river or waterfront promenade
text_queries.item_closeup: close-up of furniture or household item on a sidewalk near a gray container or dumpster
text_queries.phone_photographing: person holding a phone to photograph an object on the ground
text_queries.sky_ending: camera pointing up toward sky tree canopy or rooftops
text_queries.establishing_wide: wide establishing shot of a city street or intersection

captioning.query_prompt: Describe this scene in 5-10 words. Focus on: the main subject (building, furniture, park, street), notable objects, and camera movement. Do NOT mention bicycle, cycling, handlebars, or POV.
